sourceMovie.title: Night Shift
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Night Shift (2024) stuck because it commits to its horror premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Rigoberto Castañeda's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: Silent Hill
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Night Shift clicked for you, Silent Hill (2006) is a strong next stop: both trade in horror, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Night Shift?
faq.answer: Try Silent Hill, Final Destination 2, Barbarian—each shares DNA with Night Shift while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Night Shift?
faq.answer: Night Shift (2024) is best described as Horror. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Night Shift worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.4/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this horror lane.
